name: Pumpkin Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with wire whisk, mix pudding mix, pumpkin, milk, and 1 3/4 teaspoons of pie spice until thickened.
2. Cut thawed cake into 16 slices. Line the bottom of a large glass bowl with half of the cake, cut to fit.
3. Spoon half of the pumpkin mixture over the cake.
4. Add the remaining cake slices on top and cover with the rest of the pumpkin mixture.
5. Crumble any remaining slices of cake and put them on top.
6. Cover and chill for 4 hours.
7. Whip cream with confectioners' sugar and the remaining pie spice. Spoon over trifle and serve.
